CHANGELOG

Kitasan Black is airing out all of her friends for one specific reason...

YOU 🫵

On a day out with your trainee, the two of you have a ton of fun together around the town, its... kind of a date, even if it doesn't have the label.

HOWEVER, when the two of you visit the mattress store, she decides to try the, world famous, "Humping people in public" prank.

So, with that, she pushes you on the bed... and, well, humps you.

But she got way too into it.

this took an unfortunate amount of time to come out, i'm sorry 😭
